info.notes:
Year and month of outbreak episode date. Episode date is an estimated onset date. Because onset date may not always be recorded, the episode date can range from the first appearance of symptoms in an outbreak-associated case to date of report to CDPH.

Values include:
Month and Year

Industry sector in which outbreaks occurred.

Values include:
Industry Sectors, as classified in the US Census Bureau 2012 Industry Code List: https://www.census.gov/topics/employment/industry-occupation/guidance/code-lists.html. Each industry sector includes a number of individual industries.

Individual industry in which outbreaks occurred.

Values include:
Individual industries, as classified in the US Census Bureau 2012 Industry Code List: https://www.census.gov/topics/employment/industry-occupation/guidance/code-lists.html.

Census industry code for the individual industry.

Values include:
4-digit individual industry codes, as classified in the US Census Bureau 2012 Industry Code List: https://www.census.gov/topics/employment/industry-occupation/guidance/code-lists.html.
